creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello rigoletto!

I've tried to run powerdxx on 14 current but it doesn't work.
Could you take a look at https://github.com/lonkamikaze/powerdxx/issues/15 ?

Maybe it is a good solution to have a pkg-message telling how to run it.
I don't know about 13 Release, but I used to run it ok on 12 Release.

What you think?
